CREATE TABLE test_table (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String, partition_key UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;

CREATE TABLE test_table_alias (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String ALIAS concat(primary_key, secondary_key), partition_key UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;
CREATE TABLE deduplicate_table (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String, partition_key UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;

CREATE TABLE complex_table (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String, partition_key UInt32, extra_value String MATERIALIZED 'value') ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;
CREATE TABLE regex_table (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String, partition_key UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;
OPTIMIZE TABLE regex_table WHERE primary_key IN (SELECT primary_key FROM regex_table WHERE secondary_key = 1);

CREATE TABLE replicated_table (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String, partition_key UInt32) ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/path/to/table', 'replica') ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (primary_key UInt32, secondary_key UInt32, value String, partition_key UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key) PARTITION BY partition_key;
OPTIMIZE TABLE nested_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT value FROM nested_table WHERE primary_key = 1);
